stemHtml:
What are the differences between Lithium-based batteries and Nickel-Cadmium (NiCd) batteries? Select the statements which are correct.

1. Lithium batteries are heavier than NiCd batteries
2. Lithium batteries are more prone to thermal runaway than NiCd batteries
3. Lithium batteries are less expensive than NiCd batteries
4. Lithium batteries are more sensitive to self-discharge when damaged than NiCd batteries
5. Lithium batteries are more flammable than NiCd batteries
